label: About
title: About Waterline Pose Observatory
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 101 recent saved-signal files and 79 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around a model carrying another model away who is reaching out to another model trailing behind trying... and A woman in a two piece black bathing suit, head touching the surface of the water, one knee..., plus 7 more. A source image from adorkastock.com helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Waterline Pose Observatory: A source-led pose-reference waterline observatory: print contact sheet composition, browserless media shrine grammar. A huge diagonal carry/reach chain crosses a white studio void, two hero-scale source apertures embedded as body-scale slabs; below, an aqua submerged band bends smaller marks. After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against large central diagonal body-and-water aperture, upper-left aqua fabric crop, and upper-middle submerged skin pinhole crop.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
